attributes.action:
Make wheat/gluten free sandwiches deals
To make the cost of gluten free cheaper
attributes.additional_details: I want the government to help as it’s not fair on the gulten free/ wheat free allergies people.. my boyfriend got told he has a wheat allergy in December and there is hardly any mead deals in shops and the prices of everything double and it’s not fair he didn’t ask to have a wheat allergy
attributes.background:
We want the government to bring in gulten free/wheat free sandwiches and crisps as a meal deal instead of it being just normal sandwiches 
To put in places lower cost for foods that are gluten and wheat free

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fund vouchers for free from, vegan & gluten free items for people with allergies
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750775
